title: The Romance of Lust: A classic Victorian erotic novel
author: Anonymous
summary: A pubescent narrator describes growing sexual awareness while living with his mother and two younger sisters. When a young governess, Miss Evelyn, is engaged, her beauty, neatness and apparent relish for corporal discipline awaken the narrator’s intense desire. Secret observations of her nightly undress, bathing at a bidet, and exposing of legs, bottom and genitalia inflame the boy. He chronicles voyeuristic rapture, childish explorations with his sisters, and the household dynamics—mother’s management, Susan the servant, and the dead father’s modest provision—culminating in obsessive longing and ignorance about sexual intercourse.
